news.title: Global Market:  China's factory inflation hits four-year high, keeping metals and industrial stocks in focus
news.description: China's factory-gate inflation reached its fastest pace in four years during June. Producer prices rose 4.1 percent year-on-year, driven by energy and commodity costs.
